EmailTemplate.description: Email to use after ringing a new Swoop lead and making no contact by phone, with calendar invite included.
EmailTemplate.name: Swoop Follow Up (Calendar)
EmailTemplate.subject: Requested insurance quote via Swoop
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’ve not been able to reach you today regarding your request for an insurance quote via our partner, Swoop.
It will only take 5-10 minutes to provide you with a comprehensive quote. Book a call with me today - https://calendly.com/d/cm2p-trc-cnn/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back-swoop
Here at Kingsbridge we offer several complete packages of cover that are designed specifically for UK businesses.
Why buy with Kingsbridge?
- Tailored solutions: Coverage is specifically designed for contractors, freelancers, and small businesses, so you get protection that meets your needs. - Dedicated support: Kingsbridge’s in-house claims and underwriting teams work closely with you and the insurer, providing guidance and peace of mind throughout your policy. - Proven customer satisfaction: With customer ratings of 4.8/5 on Feefo and 4.6/5 on Google, Kingsbridge has a reputation for excellent service.
So that I can discuss which of our schemes would be most relevant for your business, it would be good to speak over the phone. Book a call with me - https://calendly.com/d/cm2p-trc-cnn/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back-swoop
Alternatively, you can reply to let me know a good time to call or contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
